market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Ripple targets Africa’s booming remittance market with Flutterwave investment
articles.description: Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction.

articles.title: Self-driving tech supplier Mobileye wants to be part of the robotaxi revolution — again
articles.description: The Israeli tech company and Intel subsidiary said it will launch its own robotaxi service in a U.S. city in 2027.

articles.title: Why US-regulated Bitcoin perpetuals could change crypto trading
articles.description: US-regulated Bitcoin perpetual futures could give retail and institutional traders new ways to access crypto derivatives.

articles.title: Snap finally debuts its long awaited AR glasses, Specs, and, oof, they aren’t cheap
articles.description: After many years, Snap is finally launching its next consumer-focused smart glasses line.

articles.title: Sixty percent of U.S. consumers say ‘AI’ in brand messaging is a turnoff, survey finds
articles.description: WordPress VIP’s latest survey suggests consumers are wary of AI-generated answers even as companies increasingly view AI search as an important referral channel.

articles.title: Binance says it considers EU license compliant amid reports of potential rejection
articles.description: Without specifically calling out a report on Binance’s EU license, the crypto exchange warned that any rejection forcing it to delay activities in the region could “weaken liquidity” and present other potential risks.

articles.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
articles.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

articles.title: Ripple invests in Flutterwave, pushing its stablecoin and XRP Ledger into payments across Africa
articles.description: The deal values Flutterwave at $3.2 billion, and will integrate Ripple's RLUSD and the XRP Ledger network to speed cross-border payments across Africa.

articles.title: Payments startup Flutterwave hits $3.2B valuation, backed by Ripple
articles.description: African payments infrastructure company Flutterwave has hit a new valuation and landed blockchain company Ripple as an investor and partner.

articles.title: DOJ claims xAI’s unpermitted gas turbines are a matter of ‘national, economic, and energy security’
articles.description: The Justice department says the Pentagon needs xAI to keep using its unpermitted gas turbines.

articles.title: Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments
articles.description: The crypto exchange said investors will own the shares and receive dividends, underscoring growing momentum behind tokenized securities.

articles.title: Plaud says its software business topped $100M in ARR after shipping over 2M AI notetakers
articles.description: Plaud is trying to make a mark in a crowded market full of AI-powered meeting notetakers.

articles.title: Binance says its European regulatory application is compliant despite report of Greek rejection
articles.description: An EU crypto license application by the world’s largest crypto exchange is set to be rejected by the Greek regulator HCMC, according to a report from Reuters.

articles.title: Robinhood’s note on 10% layoffs shows blaming AI isn’t cutting it
articles.description: Unlike many of his tech industry peers who have cut thousands of jobs citing the need to restructure  to make the most of AI, Robinhood's CEO Vlad Tenev conspicuously made no mention of AI in his note about layoffs.

articles.title: Ethereum’s biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage
articles.description: Developers are entering the final stretch of work on Glamsterdam, the network's next major upgrade, as teams begin testing a version of the fork in a closed environment.

articles.title: State Street targets stablecoin reserve boom with new money market fund
articles.description: The asset manager joins BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and others competing to manage reserves backing the growing stablecoin market.

articles.title: Bitcoin stocks divergence returns as BTC dips to $66K while oil drops under $78
articles.description: Bitcoin joined oil in heading lower while stocks gained on US-Iran peace momentum, with traders seeing a quick end to the BTC price rebound.

articles.title: 穿越 80 億光年的「宇宙雷射」，南非望遠鏡捕捉史上最強超巨大邁射
articles.description: 南非無線電天文台（SARAO）運作的 MeerKAT 無線電望遠鏡，近日偵測到距離最遙遠的羥基巨大邁射（hyd […]

articles.title: SpaceX’s debut: A win for crypto price discovery, a fail for tokenized access
articles.description: SpaceX’s blockbuster debut didn’t just mint a trillionaire; it became a real-world stress test for crypto’s promise of democratized market access.

articles.title: Why a ‘safe’ AI can turn dangerous in the wrong company
articles.description: A 15-day AI agent simulation shows why short tests may miss long-term risks shaped by tools, rules and other agents.
